items.title: Mali Rebels Strike Major Blow Against Junta and Russia’s Africa Corps
items.summary: Coordinated attacks signified a major escalation of insurgent violence in a region of West Africa where military leaders had seized power and warmed to Moscow in recent years.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Performer describes locking eyes with Trump as they ducked for cover during shooting
items.summary: Oz Pearlman - a self-described "mentalist" - was speaking to Trump, First Lady Melania Trump and press secretary Karoline Leavitt as the attack happened.
